description: A bundler for javascript and friends. Packs many modules into a few bundled assets. Code Splitting allows for loading parts of the application on demand. Through "loaders", modules can be CommonJs, AMD, ES6 modules, CSS, Images, JSON, Coffeescript, LESS, ... and your custom stuff.
commit_message:
perf(html): speed up the experimental HTML parser and reduce its memory usage (#21130)

* perf(html): cut HTML parser allocations and tokenizer per-char overhead

walkHtmlTokens: replace the per-code-point ASCII predicate chains with a
single packed Uint8Array char-class lookup table, hoist the two
closure-local predicates to module scope, and slice the
named-character-reference candidate run from the input once instead of
re-slicing per prefix length.

buildHtmlAst: move per-token tag-name memb
